## How I tested

Name the specific tests or commands that passed. "I ran the tests" is NOT enough.
Examples:

  - `pnpm test:integration tests/integration/shelf.test.ts` — hits local PDS, green
  - `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build` — clean
